zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter於1502年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福時，他的父親James de Clifford30歲，母親Anne Harewell24歲。他於1530年與Mabel Welsche在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 奧 澤福結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年6月14日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福利黑爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter was born in 1502, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, his father, James de Clifford, was 30 and his mother, Anne Harewell, was 24. He married Mabel Welsche in 1530, in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 June 1558, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Fretherne, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter est né en 1502, à Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, James de Clifford, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne Harewell, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mabel Welsche en 1530, à Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Fretherne, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter 1502 in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James de Clifford 30 und seine Mutter Anne Harewell 24. Er hat 1530 in Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England Mabel Welsche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juni 1558 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Fretherne, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter è nato il nel 1502 nel Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, James de Clifford, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anne Harewell, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mabel Welsche nel 1530, nel Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 giugno 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Fretherne, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garterが1502年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン オン セバーンで生まれた時，父James de Cliffordは30歳，母Anne Harewellは24歳であった。1530年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン オン セバーンでMabel Welscheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年6月14日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフレスエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter(이)가 1502년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James de Clifford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Harewell(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1530년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴  세버에서 Mabel Welsche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 6월 14일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프레더니에 묻혔다.

mn.1590: Fretherne, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter nasceu em 1502, em Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de Clifford, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne Harewell, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel Welsche em 1530, em Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Fretherne, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter родился в 1502 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени James de Clifford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Harewell, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Welsche в 1530 г. в местности фрамптон он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 июня 1558 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности фретирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry De Clifford Knight of the Garter nació en 1502, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, James de Clifford, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Harewell, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mabel Welsche en 1530, en Frampton on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de junio de 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Fretherne, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
